arts.ttl: Arsenal face Chelsea hijack as Man Utd plot new bid for top target: FT recap
arts.sum: Arsenal face Chelsea hijack as Man Utd plot new bid for top target: FT recap Plus, Man Utd engaged in fresh talks over Ruben Amorim's preferred new signing and the Portuguese tactician also seemingly banished Marcus Rashford from his squad for good.

arts.ttl: Arsenal close in on transfer of 'next Martin Odegaard' after Erling Haaland hint
arts.sum: Arsenal are hoping to win the race for Rosenborg star Sverre Nypan, who has been compared to Martin Odegaard, with Aston Villa, Tottenham and Manchester City's sister club Girona also interested in the teenager

arts.ttl: Arsenal given clear instructions to appeal Myles Lewis-Skelly ban with strict deadline
arts.sum: Myles Lewis-Skelly was shown a controversial red card for a foul on Wolves' Matt Doherty on Saturday and Arsenal are intending to appeal against the decision of referee Michael Oliver and the VAR

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Arsenal are saying about signing Evan Ferguson as Marcus Rashford question also answered
arts.sum: Arsenal sources have confirmed to TBR Football that they have not asked about loaning Brighton striker Evan Ferguson this month while it’s also clear why...

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Deal agreed as Blues attempt Arsenal hijack
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Axel Disasi has agreed personal terms with Aston Villa as talks between the two clubs over a late January transfer progress. Chelsea Transfer News Today: Deal agreed as Blues attempt Arsenal hijack
